acceptance_criteria: The recursive method is documented and committed in repo artifacts.
The process validator enforces stage order, handoffs, module profile evidence, and changed-path coverage.

open_questions.question: Parent work item closes through child slices rather than direct code generation.

objective: Ground the process in existing workspace boundaries and governance rules.
findings: The repo already centers contracts, workflows, and governed agent handoffs.
A machine-readable process layer can reuse AgentHandoffV1 and the existing schema embedding pattern.
constraints: Public contract changes must remain additive-first.
decomposition_signals: The initiative touches schemas, agents, shared tooling, docs, testing, and CI.
